configure.title: Configure identity

form.name: Club name
form.name_helper: Your full club name as it appears in the founding document (without “Club”)
form.nameEN_helper: Replaces the Thai name for English users.
form.desc_helper: This is shown in your entry in the Explore page.
form.descEN_helper: Replaces the Thai description for English users. Not required.

configure.contrastWarning: Your chosen colors do not meet contrast guidelines and may be unreadable.

contacts.title: Contact information
contacts.desc: New club members will get a chance to join these groups after you approve them.

onLeaderboard.headline: Congratulations, you're number {{order}} on the leaderboard!
onLeaderboard.desc_one: You're {{count, number}} member behind {{club}} Club, which is at number {{order}}.
onLeaderboard.desc_other: You're {{count, number}} members behind {{club}} Club, which is at number {{order}}.

manualCard.title: Add a member manually
manualCard.desc: Use school email to enroll into your club.

awaiting.title: Awaiting approval
awaiting.desc: Only approve those who have already paid the entry fee.
awaiting.empty: When students ask to join your club, their requests show up here.

approved.title: Approved members
approved.empty: You don't have any members yet. When you approve new members, they'll show up here.
